notes: Use REST polling first with stable dedupe keys and provider-side pagination.
Process repo sources serially to respect GitHub secondary-rate-limit guidance.
Webhook delivery and replay governance are intentionally deferred to Phase 6.
Treat deployment history as additive delivery evidence, not a replacement for project state.
Capture recent deployment status, environment, and target URLs in normalized event form.
Calendar support is scaffolded in Phase 5 but not part of the first live slice.
When activated later, use sync-token based incremental sync with full resync on 410.
Local provider — reads JSONL event log from notification-hub at ~/.local/share/notification-hub/events.jsonl.
NOTIFICATION_HUB_LOG_PATH env var overrides the default path.
Deduplication is by event_id via the shared eventKeySet.
Events without a matching local project are skipped with a warning count.
